FieldTek

AI-powered field service management platform

FieldTek is a field service management platform powered by Sentinel AI, a proprietary compliance and diagnostic engine for HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and mechanical contractors.

Core Features

Sentinel AI: Real-time compliance diagnostics with NEC, IPC, IMC code verification
AI-guided install and repair procedures from manufacturer documentation
Automatic compliance documentation generation
Warranty protection and OEM specification verification
Equipment Knowledge Graph with failure mode tracking
Workflow Intelligence with pattern discovery and success rate analysis
Job scheduling, dispatch, and tracking
Photo evidence with GPS and timestamp verification
Client portal for service request submission

Target Users

HVAC contractors
Electrical contractors
Plumbing contractors
Mechanical contractors
Field service managers
Operations managers

Key Differentiators

Proprietary AI (Sentinel AI) trained on technical documentation and equipment data
Real-time code compliance alerts during installations and repairs
Automatic warranty compliance verification against OEM specifications
Manufacturer-specific guidance (not generic)
Self-improving AI that learns from every completed job
Equipment Knowledge Graph mapping models, components, and failure modes
Workflow Intelligence discovering repair patterns across your fleet

Links

Pricing: https://fieldtek.ai/pricing
FAQ: https://fieldtek.ai/faq
